$comment: c14e shipped <pthread.h> — the 6th/last POSIX header. The mutex lifecycle (init/lock/unlock/destroy via dynamic libc.so.6); pthread_mutex_t is an opaque 48-byte 8-aligned buffer (arr<i64,6>, the max per-arch glibc size), &mutex coerces to the symbols' void* param. lock/unlock return 0 on a real Linux runtime → exit 42. Two elf targets (POSIX header, availableObjectFormats:[elf], Linux WSL run target). Runs on linux-gcc + native arm64 CI legs; cross-compiles locally. RED-ON-DISABLE: drop a surface → pthread_mutex_t/pthread_mutex_lock undefined → compile fails.
